title: Paragon on Hyperliquid: Trade Bitcoin Dominance
summary_title: Bitcoin dominance finally tradeable: Paragon launches three crypto indices on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Paragon deploys BTC.D, Total2, and Others as actionable perpetuals—turning decade-old analyst charts into hedgeable instruments.

key_moments.label: Paragon introduced as new HIP3 deployer, deployed 12 hours prior
Taha's background: tradfi structured finance to crypto builder since 2013
Bitcoin dominance found to be charted 30-40% as much as BTC itself
HIP3 infrastructure unlock enables focused asset creation without rebuilding UX
Perps superior to spot for bootstrapping two-sided markets and new indices
Three live tickers: BTC.D, Total2, Others—125-name basket design explained
Table demonstrations show Bitcoin dominance sub-2% moves vs Bitcoin's 13% gap down
Paragon fronted 500K HLP themselves, no token staking from community at launch

pull_quote: These things are actually some of the most charted, widely tracked tickers in crypto—30 or 40% as many mentions as Bitcoin itself—yet remain completely analytical and non-actionable.
